pullRequest.title: [DOM-55073] Flows: executor writes outputs success flag file instead of user code

nodes.body: What happens in workflows that have no inputs or outputs? Is there any risk that this would fail if `/workflow/outputs/` didn't already exist?
this func is never called if there are no outputs. so there is no risk in that respect
if there are outputs, then the `/workflow/outputs/` directory will exist because it is mounted as an empty dir by k8s
Lol congrats, you now own all of this code
